mapper.select: SELECT product_id FROM om_product_m WHERE corporation_cd = #{corporationCd} AND product_cd = #{productCd} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT product_id , corporation_cd , product_cd , product_nm , product_type , (SELECT unit_cd FROM om_product_unit WHERE product_id = om_product_m.product_id AND is_base_unit = true LIMIT 1) AS base_unit_cd , is_sale , is_display , product_info ->> 'product_en_nm' AS product_en_nm , product_info ->> 'category_cd' AS category_cd , product_info ->> 'brand_cd' AS brand_cd , (product_info ->> 'cost_price')::numeric AS cost_price , (product_info ->> 'supply_price')::numeric AS supply_price , product_info ->> 'tax_type' AS tax_type , (product_info ->> 'safety_stock_qty')::int AS safety_stock_qty , (product_info ->> 'min_order_qty')::int AS min_order_qty , (product_info ->> 'max_order_qty')::int AS max_order_qty , (product_info ->> 'sort_order')::int AS sort_order , product_info ->> 'description' AS description , product_info ->> 'image_url' AS image_url , product_info ->> 'remark' AS remark FROM om_product_m WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_product_m ( product_id, corporation_cd, product_cd, product_nm, product_type, sale_price, stock_qty, is_gift, is_sale, is_display, product_info, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{req.corporationCd}, #{req.productCd}, #{req.productNm}, COALESCE(#{req.productType}, 'SINGLE'), 0, 0, false, COALESCE(#{req.isSale}, true), COALESCE(#{req.isDisplay}, true), ('{}'::jsonb || jsonb_build_object('product_en_nm', #{req.productEnNm}::text) || jsonb_build_object('category_cd', #{req.categoryCd}::text) || jsonb_build_object('brand_cd', #{req.brandCd}::text) || jsonb_build_object('cost_price', (#{req.costPrice})::numeric) || jsonb_build_object('supply_price', (#{req.supplyPrice})::numeric) || jsonb_build_object('tax_type', #{req.taxType}::text) || jsonb_build_object('safety_stock_qty', (#{req.safetyStockQty})::int) || jsonb_build_object('min_order_qty', (#{req.minOrderQty})::int) || jsonb_build_object('max_order_qty', (#{req.maxOrderQty})::int) || jsonb_build_object('sort_order', nextval('seq_product_sort_order')::int) || jsonb_build_object('description', #{req.description}::text) || jsonb_build_object('image_url', #{req.imageUrl}::text) || jsonb_build_object('remark', #{req.remark}::text) ), #{createdBy}, #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO om_product_m ( product_id, corporation_cd, product_cd, product_nm, product_type, sale_price, stock_qty, is_gift, is_sale, is_display, product_info, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES
(#{row.productId}, #{row.corporationCd}, #{row.productCd}, #{row.productNm}, COALESCE(#{row.productType}, 'SINGLE'), 0, 0, false, COALESCE(#{row.isSale}, true), COALESCE(#{row.isDisplay}, true), (COALESCE(#{row.productInfoJson}, '{}')::jsonb || jsonb_build_object('sort_order', nextval('seq_product_sort_order')::int)), #{row.createdBy}, #{row.createdBy})
